description: HIGHLY sought-after “GARDEN ESTATES”! Fully renovated upper rancher-style townhouse offers 2 bdrms + den, (Den easily a 3rd bdrm) 2.5 baths, and over 1,700 sq.ft. of beautifully updated living space. Features include a new kitchen, bathrooms, flooring, appliances, lighting, hot water on demand, & upgraded heating system. Bright open layout boasts cozy gas fireplace & plenty of room for full-sized furniture. The modern kitchen showcases white cabinets, quartz counters & black stainless appliances. Both spacious bedrooms include full ensuite bathrooms, providing comfort and privacy. Enjoy 2 expansive, sun-drenched decks—perfect for entertaining or relaxing outdoors. Includes a single-car garage plus an additional parking pad. Quietly located at the end of the complex & steps to Holly School.
